overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit city. The player descends from an elevated glass walkway to street level, passing through a commercial district with bright advertisements and entering a covered pedestrian walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated glass walkway overlooking lower city streets

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated glass walkway with view of rain-soaked streets below

entered.detail: transparent glass floor panels showing street level below
teal-colored metal safety railings lining the walkway
illuminated sign for Brooklyn Baris establishment
neon sign for El Dorado visible on building facade
multiple bright neon advertisements on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated glass walkway high above the city streets. Teal metal railings line the path while neon signs and billboards illuminate the rainy night. The transparent floor reveals the lower levels of the city as the camera moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway transition from elevated walkway to street level

events.description: descends concrete stairs from elevated walkway to street level

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs from elevated walkway to street level while rain falls

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella walking up the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: wet concrete stairs descending to street level
illuminated awning for El Dorado establishment
trees lining the sidewalk at street level

segments.scene_description: The camera descends concrete stairs from the elevated walkway to street level, transitioning from sheltered to exposed as rain becomes more apparent. A pedestrian with an umbrella ascends the stairs in the opposite direction. The El Dorado awning becomes prominent on the right as the street level approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with bars and advertisements

events.description: passing bright pink neon storefronts reflecting on wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking along rain-soaked sidewalk past neon-lit bars and storefronts

notable_agents.action: person with yellow umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: storefront with bright pink neon lighting and vertical light strips
large illuminated billboard with Girrus advertisement

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wet city sidewalk, the scene features vibrant pink neon bar signs reflecting off the rain-soaked pavement. Trees line the right side while various billboards and advertisements illuminate the street. A pedestrian with a yellow umbrella walks ahead on the left as the camera passes wooden benches and approaches a building overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street approaching covered pedestrian underpass

events.description: entering covered walkway beneath building overpass

agents.ego_description: approaching covered walkway entrance with scattered pedestrians nearby

entered.detail: large building structure extending over the street creating a covered passage
storefront with El Dorado Pawn Shop signage
rack with magazines and newspapers on the sidewalk
large billboard featuring cartoon character with green hair holding a drink

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a building overpass that creates a covered walkway ahead. A large cartoon character billboard dominates the right side while the El Dorado Pawn Shop entrance becomes visible. The street opens into a plaza area with a magazine stand on the left as the covered entrance draws near.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with digital ceiling advertisements

events.description: entering covered area with artificial lighting and digital ceiling displays

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway passing shops and overhead digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: person standing near magazine stand browsing items

entered.detail: enclosed pedestrian passage with roof overhead
digital screens and advertisements covering the ceiling of the walkway
storefronts with metal shutters and illuminated signs
automated vending machine on the left wall

segments.scene_description: Entering the covered walkway, the environment shifts to artificial lighting with digital advertisements displayed overhead. The El Dorado Pawn Shop and other storefronts line the right side while a vending machine appears on the left. The space feels more enclosed and sheltered from the rain, with scattered pedestrians browsing near the magazine stand.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person descent from a high-altitude glass walkway down into the rain-soaked, neon-lit corridors of a commercial city district. It begins atop an elevated path with teal railings and a transparent floor, moving steadily forward amidst glowing billboards before descending a set of concrete stairs. As the camera reaches street level, the environment opens up to a wet sidewalk where pink neon signs reflect off the pavement and pedestrians with umbrellas navigate the rain. The scene then shifts toward a building overpass, passing a large cartoon billboard and the El Dorado Pawn Shop entrance as the street expands into a small plaza. Finally, the camera moves under the overpass into a covered walkway, where the open rain gives way to an enclosed space filled with artificial lighting, digital overhead advertisements, and storefronts.
